ground_truth.title: Erie, PA Long Distance Movers | North American Van Lines
ground_truth.main_content:
Erie Movers: Long Distance & Local
Founded in 1905, B. F Fields Moving & Storage started out as a residential moving company with a vision to provide great customer service and moving solutions to those throughout the Erie, PA area. Since then, the company has continued to grow and now offers a wide range of moving services, including industrial moves and storage options. With a 110 years of moving experience, we have the knowledge and essentials you need to complete any move.  Call us today to get started!

Services Provided:
Long Distance Movers
International Moving Services
Household Moving Services
National Moving Services
Corporate Relocation Services
Residential Moving
Interstate Movers
Intrastate Movers
Full Service Moving Services
Packing & Crating
Moving Supplies
Free Moving Quotes
Competitive Pricing
Local Movers
Cross Country Movers

Customer Reviews
Overall Rating:  4.85 / 5
BENES       F.: The overall professionalism of the move. The move was in a timely manner. The crew did their job. The crew's communication was excellent. The crew deserves a raise.
BELFIGLIO P.: The pricing was good and the overall move was good all the way around. That is why I used this company a second time.
DAVID V.: The quality of the crew, Scott's ability to answer my questions and follow through with everything. If I had to move again I would like to have to same crew which is Scott and Kurt.
GERMAN D.: The quality of service, the responsiveness of the owner and the communication of the crew. The same crew that loaded the items unloaded the items.
DEE P.: The driver was great. There was a little confusion with getting back to us and returning phone calls.
